# Vfs struct implementation in Rust (2026-03-13 05:23Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 4 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 4: 虚拟 FS — Vfs 结构体与根目录**

In src/vfs.rs add:

pub struct Vfs {
    root: Node,
    cwd: String,
}

impl Vfs {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Vfs {
            root: Node::Dir { name: "".to_string(), children: vec![] },
            cwd: "/".to_string(),
        }
    }
    pub fn cwd(&self) -> &str { &self.cwd }
    pub fn root(&self) -> &Node { &self.root }
}

Run cargo build. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): Vfs struct and root"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: what added, build result, commit.
